distinctive_elements: PC speaker sound effects for combat and explosions
Sound card support for music (not yet common at release)

note: SNES port released 1994; Wikipedia source contains general Ultima VI information but lacks specific music composition details, tempo data, key signatures, chord progressions, or area-specific soundtrack parameters. Original 1990 PC version documented as supporting sound cards for music with PC speaker for effects, but composer and technical audio specifications not documented in available sources.
